visual_description: A woman in a maroon shirt stands at the foot of a gurney, looking down at a person lying on it. Two men, one in a white shirt and tie and the other in a dark suit, stand at the head of the gurney, observing. A third man in a white shirt leans over the person on the gurney, appearing to examine or work on their back.
audio_description: A male voice is speaking, providing what sounds like a medical or procedural explanation. The audio is clear and the tone is informative.
